use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ANEMIA DUE TO CHRONIC KIDNEY DISEASE

indications.text:
1.1 Anemia Due to Chronic Kidney Disease
OMONTYS® is indicated for the treatment of anemia due to chronic kidney disease (CKD) in
adult patients on dialysis.
1.2 Limitations of Use
OMONTYS is not indicated and is not recommended for use:
 In patients with CKD not on dialysis because of safety conce...
